reviews.review_description: I know some people gripe about 3rd person platform games in VR, but I love them. This one has a lot of the little things that remind me of Mario and Sonic. Every level is unique and there are bonus repeatable levels so you can collect more coins along the way. Plus, it was a blast to try and get the speed run.

Been meaning to play this for a long time. Finally get to play it and wow it did not disappoint. I love it when gaming is pure joy like this game gives me. Great graphics, very creative game design, everything is thought out. You can tell devs put real passion and love into this game.  10/10
It's just a really good experience. Nice visuals, with good resolution. Audio is chilled and it runs well. I'd say this is nigh on a perfect platformer for stand alone.

reviews.review_title: One of the best platformers in VR
reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of similarities with Astrobot from PSVR1. Like Astrobot, it has lots of interesting levels and first-person mechanics that need to be used in conjunction with controlling the third-person character. The game has a lot of charm, and the art style with bright colors looks great in VR (similar style to Astrobot, but obviously sharper due to the much higher resolution of the Quest 3). I like how you can use the coins to buy upgrades, so it's not just collecting them for the sake of it. This game is in my opinion the best platformer on the Quest alongside the Moss series and Lucky's Tale.
Super Ma... like game. Very well done Love the music. Highly recommend. The physics are great
The game is fun, with short and easy levels, each of which is very entertaining. The reason I gave it 4 stars instead of 5 is because the storyline could be more interesting imo.
The controls feel so responsive and precise. VR has completely reignited my love for platformers, bringing back that childhood excitement. I genuinely loved this game. A truly happy experience.
Brilliant through and through! Played Astro Bot Rescue Mission on PSVR and this is the closest you will get to it on Quest. So many unique gameplay mechanics and world designs!!
I wont to see more games like this
For me this is the best VR game
I fell down so many times...
Love 3D platformers. Love Max Mustard! 👍

I bought it for a long time. Just play few chapters at beginning. Just feel  it as a  another mario game but VR mode. So left it for almost a year.  This week , just play it again. After more and more chapter were completed.  I start to aware I was wrong. I overlooked its excellence. The whole design including graphics,  traps' design, difficulties, and every details are excellent.  I start to realise really lot of effort to develop this game. It also includes plenty of chapters.  I am using 10 hrs just achieve 54% completion. The whole experience is really really funny.
I wasn't sure I was going to like this game but it ended up being one of my favorites!  I couldn't put it down once I started playing it.  Endless fun!

Not as polished as Astrobot but filled to the brim w that same level of charm & engaging fun w creative & immersive levels.
Max Mustard is one of the very BEST 3D platformers in VR.
SADLY Meta has apparently just REMOVED BOTH of Toast Interactives titles from their store (Richies Plank Experience) in a move that can only be described as "STUPID AF", yet you can still find TONS of worthless, pointless, underdeveloped shovelware on Meta storefront. Seems Mark Zuckerphuker must have pissed her crusty panties on the plank and decided to call up her friend Hillary Clinton on Toasts titles. Well, the good news here is we at least got Max Mustard on PSVR2 so heres hoping well see Richies Plank  Exp. over there soon too!!??

I'm an old school gamer who loves a platform games, from Super Mario, Sonic the Hedgehog, Yoshi's Island, Crash Bandicoot & Banjo Kazooie.
This game is made by people who LOVE platform games & have brilliantly interpreted it for virtual reality.
This is not just a great platform game in VR, this is ONE of the greatest platform games EVER MADE. It really is that good...go buy it, enjoy it, tell your friends, then come back & give it a positive review

I’m only a few levels in, but wanted to take a moment to write my (first!) review, or rather first impressions of my early hours with the game.

I’ll start by saying I’m already wildly impressed! In Max Mustard, your head is essentially the camera floating above a traditional 3D platformer.

You can see your controllers in game and you’re controlling Max as you would Mario in one of his games. 

Speaking of Mario, the inspirations in this game are immediately apparent. Max will collect giant golden coins and bounce on enemies’ heads.
Max’s jumping, wall sliding and wall jumping feel almost exactly like Mario Odyssey. It’s really well done.

More than that, I feel this game is Crash Bandicoot in VR. You have the linear level design, mostly straight paths forward with little detours and side paths. Then you have all the crates to bounce on and especially the ones with the ridges that break after a certain number of jumps.

To add their own unique twist and take advantage of your perspective as some disembodied, floating creeper, the game allows you the player to interact with the world around Max, as you progress. So you work together to reach the end.

As a big fan of platformers, I’m really impressed so far. Being able to see the full world around you, to spot collectibles or understand the scale and danger of some of Max’s jumps - it all feels so much more alive and immersive!

I’ll be posting some gameplay videos over on my YouTube channel, @KevinTheMurphy!

developer_response.body:
Hey Kevin, thanks so much for playing Max Mustard and leaving such a brilliant, detailed review! We really appreciate the support.

You're absolutely spot on about much of the gameplay - our team are big fans of platformers and we've tried to capture that same sort of charm and creative gameplay that we felt back when we played our favourite early 3D platformers. Mario is a huge inspiration (as it is for many platformers) as well as Crash Bandicoot - both of them really helped set the bar for the genre.

VR really takes platformers to the next level - the immersion of being part of the world makes for such an incredible experience. And sounds like that really resonated with you!

We'd love to chat more with you on our Discord server - we've got plenty of other players and even some of the development team on there. Please feel free to join: https://discord.com/invite/DfxkeX7aRb

Thanks again for your 5-star review. It means a lot!

reviews.review_description: This game is up there with some of my favorite platformers like Astro bot and mario. Tight controles, wonderful cartoony aesthetic, creative level designs, sound design, etc. Except this game has something the other platforming greats don't, full immersion in the world! You are inside of the game experiencing the thrills and excitement with max! It is hard to have true joy and excitement as u get older but the moment i played the first level of this game i felt like i did when i played mario 64 for the first time as a kid. Truely the most fun and joyful experiences on the quest.

developer_response.body:
Hey RoNinja, thanks so much for the awesome review and for playing Max Mustard!

This is exactly what we love to hear. When making Max Mustard, we really wanted to capture that exact feeling of charm and joy that so many of us experienced back when we played our favourite classic 3D platformers. We want to take you back to what it feels like to be a kid, and just enjoy gaming for how much pure fun it can be. And it's amazing that Max Mustard was able to do that for you!

We'd love to hear even more of your thoughts on the game. You can join us to chat with the team on our Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/DfxkeX7aRb

Thanks again for playing and taking the time to leave this review. :) We really do appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Very well made game. Dont be fooled by it looking like a kids game. I’m 37 and it was hard to stop playing it was so fun and challenging. The music for the game fits so well. I hope they continue making more games like this

developer_response.body:
Hey Delsol, thanks so much for playing Max Mustard and leaving a great review for the game. :)

We'll admit that Max Mustard can look pretty bright on the surface as if it was made for a younger audience, but really the game is a love letter to so many 3D platformers that people like us grew up playing. The old-school Nintendo 64 and PlayStation One gamers will definitely enjoy it the most!

If you'd like to chat with some of the team behind the game or other players, feel free to join us on our Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/DfxkeX7aRb

Thanks again for leaving a 5-star review. We really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Hate the game's title, hate the design of the main character, but this game is GREAT. Hoping to see more games like this, where you can play sitting down by controlling a character, rather than being the character. If you’re familiar with AstroBot Rescue Mission on PSVR, this game is almost exactly like that (not quite as good, but still great). More please!

developer_response.body:
Hey Romeotheater, thanks so much for playing! We're stoked to hear how much you enjoy platforming in VR.

While not all aspects of the game are perfectly suited to your tastes, we put a tonne of work into making sure the gameplay is as enjoyable as possible in VR. Platformers work so well in virtual reality and we definitely want more players to realise that!

Would be great to chat with you more on our Discord server - please feel free to join: https://discord.com/invite/DfxkeX7aRb

Thanks again for leaving a 5-star review. We really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description:
I would have giving the game a 10/5 but after the update, I lost all my save files and the game won't even start up, it freezes when I press "start" or "options". I emailed META, they had me uninstall and do some other things and it still didn't work.

META said to email Toast Interactive, in which I did. It's been 2 weeks and I still haven't gotten a response. Absolutely RIDICULOUS!!!

Update: since my last review my game is still not working and the developers have not gotten back to me!!! Wow!

developer_response.body:
Hey Jack, sorry to hear about your experience. We only want the best experience for our players and are sorry to hear you've not received help yet with this issue.

Could you please confirm if you sent an email to hello@toast.com.au or support@toast.com.au, as we haven't received your request yet? Both these inboxes are checked daily and we would be more than willing to help fix this issue for you.

reviews.review_description:
It makes you want to play all platformers in VR.  The controls are simple, the visuals feel immersive, the music is actually not terrible.  I only beat the first World and am working on the 2nd.  But I just love sitting on my couch, jumping through the levels and collecting the coins.  

I prefer this over Moss tbh.  I’ve gotten stuck on a level for 20-30 mins on Moss and the next time Ipick it up I forgot what I was doing.   as where Max Mustard you actually complete a level and you can turn it off.  

Need more games like this.  A sequel to Max Mustard would be sweet.  And if you look at the ratings it 4.8 stars.  It’s because people want 3D platformers, not just 1st person puzzle solving crap.

developer_response.body:
Hey Chumdizz, thanks so much for playing Max Mustard and leaving such a brilliant review! We really appreciate it. 😊

We fully agree with you - platformers in VR are a genre that works surprisingly well and is underserved. Max Mustard was designed to be enjoyed in quick play sessions, so you could easily pick up and play as every level is completely unique. We also wanted to capture the same charm and joy we felt when playing early 3D platformers like Super Mario 64, Spyro, and Crash Bandicoot.

If you'd like to find out more about the game or even chat with some of the team, we'd love to see you over on our Discord server: discord.gg/DQqK59B4Nv

Thanks again for taking the time to leave a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description: Although the graphics are awesome, I soon found out that I’m not good at puzzles. Into the uninstall bin.

reviews.review_title: Great platformer, easily one of the best
reviews.review_description: Absolutely loved playing this game. One of the gems on the platform. it works amazingly well in VR and is great fun from start to finish. Can't really fault it!

developer_response.body:
Hey Cydonia, thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to leave a wonderful review for Max Mustard!

We're so glad to hear just how much you enjoyed it. Platformers in VR really are incredible and we hope you can help us spread the word to even more players.

If you'd like to chat with some of the team behind the game, please join us over on the Toast Interactive Discord: discord.gg/DQqK59B4Nv

Thanks again for your 5-star review. We really appreciate it! :)

reviews.review_description: This is really an amazing platformer to play and have played so many over the years. It really is so much fun and found the levels on the first map a good challenge.  Only purchased with a discount yesterday but this is so worth it. I highly recommend this one!
Pleasantly surprised, engaging gameplay with regular mix-ups that kept me guessing.

developer_response.body:
Hey SgtCinnamon, thanks for playing Max Mustard and leaving us an awesome review!

We designed Max Mustard so that every level felt completely unique and different so that players would have the feeling of "just one more!" every time they finished a level. Glad it has that impact on you too. :)

Thanks again for taking the time to leave a 5-star review!

reviews.review_description: Probably my top3 on quest so far.

developer_response.body:
Hey Qaziqs, thanks so much for playing Max Mustard and taking the time to leave a 5-star review! We really appreciate your kind words. :)

If you'd like to chat with some of the team behind the game, please feel free to join our Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/DfxkeX7aRb

reviews.review_description: Best platformer I’ve played on Quest yet.

developer_response.body:
Hey Robbie, thanks so much for playing Max Mustard and taking the time to leave a great review!

Platformers in VR are such a charming genre and we're stoked to be a part of that. Hopefully Max Mustard inspires even more developers to create platformers on Quest!

If you'd like to chat with more players and even some of the team behind the game, feel free to join our Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/DfxkeX7aRb

Thanks again for leaving a 5-star review. :)

reviews.review_description: This as close as you can get to mario in vr.

developer_response.body:
Hey Gemini, thanks so much for playing Max Mustard and leaving a 5-star review!

Being compared to Mario is honestly the biggest compliment any platformer can get, so we really appreciate it. 😊

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games of 2024
reviews.review_description: I've never been a fan of platformers, but I thoroughly enjoyed playing Max Mustard. It's a well-crafted game with a vast variety of mechanics. Each level has its own unique twist, which keeps the gameplay fresh until the very end. One of the best VR games of 2024. Completed 100%.

developer_response.body:
Hey SokolQuest, thanks so much for your kind words and leaving such a great review!

We love hearing how much you enjoyed playing the game. We wanted the game's levels to all feel completely unique to give players the feeling of "just one more!" each time you finished a level. Definitely sounds like we managed to achieve that for you!

If you'd like to chat with some of the team behind the game, we'd love to see you on our Discord: discord.gg/DQqK59B4Nv

Thanks again for your 5-star review and for playing Max Mustard.

reviews.review_description: I can not wait for a sequel l, because a game this good must have one in the works!
Just give it a try!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5-star review, OCU8892145! Platformers in VR work so well and we love seeing even more players explore the genre through Max Mustard. 😁

reviews.review_description: the game looks good but when I start playing this one I have a feeling that it is around 70 fps like one quest 1, eyes get tired very quick. could you please add a setting to choose low resolution or fps?

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We're sorry to hear that the framerate is causing discomfort. You're indeed correct; we've capped the game to target 72FPS to ensure a decent resolution without compromising our artistic vision. We've not actually received any complaints about the base frame rate before.

Would a feature to prioritise frame rate over resolution be something you'd enjoy? Your feedback is important to us, and we're always looking for ways to improve the experience.

If you'd like to discuss this further or provide more feedback, feel free to email us at support@toast.com.au or join our community Discord server (discord.gg/42yBxsCZJR).

Thanks for your support and insights!

reviews.review_title: The Mario style game I was looking for!
reviews.review_description:
Fantastic. Plays well, easy to control, not frustrating. If you love Mario Galaxy, you'll love this! Huge scale. You won't be disappointed.

Update: after playing this game more, it just gets better and better. It is one of the best games I've ever played - ever. It feels like the perfect combination of 3d Mario & Sonic, but even better. Sometimes you get given some different guns to help Max turning it into a part platformer, part shooter. You can unlock power ups. There are fun bonus games. Lots of different mechanics. The enemies are really  cool & very cute - so cute in one level I almost didn't want to kill them haha. The bosses are awesome. The levels switch between just fun & then some tough ones, but you respawn at the considerately placed checkpoints. There are some hidden things to collect. Everything is "just right". Get this game. Essential.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review, Barebowarcher! We're thrilled to hear that Max Mustard gave you the Mario-style experience you were looking for. It's great to know that you found the gameplay smooth and enjoyable.

If you'd like to stay updated with all things Max Mustard, share your thoughts, or just say hi, feel free to join our Discord server: discord.gg/8rDmh8N.

Thanks again for your support and kind words! We're so glad you're enjoying the game. <3

reviews.review_description:
I wasn't sure it made sense to play a plateformer in VR, then I beta tested it and even with the early version bugs I couldn't put it down!

If you like Mario you'll like this!

developer_response.body:
It means the world to us to hear those kind words. Hearing that you couldn't put Max Mustard down, even in the buggy beta days, is extremely inspirational. 

Speaking of the bugs, the game wouldn't be what it is without your support helping our team iron out all of the issues. Thank you so much for being a part of the journey. 

<3

reviews.review_description: With the quest III this is great platform game and only in a few levels I’ve played its worth the wait. Easy to pick up and play, and difficult enough to try and get all the coins.

developer_response.body: Thanks! If you're only a few levels in, you are in for a treat in the later levels.

reviews.review_description: First off let me say that I’m a 51 year old male. I just love this game because it’s got such a nostalgic feel to it. It makes me feel like I’m a kid again! There’s no reading chats, solving clues, reading maps, or anything complicated. No instructions needed. Just launch it and start playing. I highly recommended this game to anyone young or old. It truly is a lot of fun to play.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a bunch for your awesome review and the solid 5 stars! 🌟 It's fantastic to hear how Max Mustard brought out that nostalgic feeling for you. We totally get what you mean about feeling like a kid again - that's exactly what we aimed for!

Your words mean a lot, especially coming from someone with a lifetime of gaming experience. It's great to hear that you appreciated the simplicity and the pure fun of the game.

If you ever want to share more of your experiences or join discussions about reliving that inner child joy, hop on over to our Discord server: https://discord.com/invite/8rDmh8N. We'd love to have you there!

Thanks again for your support and for being part of our community. Here's to many more adventures in Max Mustard! 🎮

reviews.review_description: I had such a fun time playing this game. The level design is so good and there's so much variety. Definitely not a game to miss out on if you're into platformers!

developer_response.body: Thanks a bunch for the awesome review and the 5 stars! 🌟 We're thrilled to hear that you had a blast with Max Mustard. Thanks for jumping in and helping out with the testing too, really appreciate the support <3

reviews.review_description:
I have only played a few levels of the game, so this is not my comprehensive review of it.

I have never played a platform game in virtual reality before, and I have immediately fallen in love with this game.
I am thoroughly enjoying the experience thus far.
What a truly well-crafted game.

developer_response.body:
A massive thanks for the kind words and the 5 stars! <3
We're so glad to hear that you've fallen in love with our 
game! We hope that you'll enjoy the rest of the game too!  

Also we've got a community discord server, so if you'd like to stay up to date with MM DLC news and share your  game your moments swing on by: https://discord.gg/8rDmh8N

reviews.review_description:
I don’t normally leave reviews but this game needs praise for what it is. I completed the game last night and really enjoyed the game play. You would be mistaken to think the only demographic is for younger players BUT it does have some challenging levels to keep you on your toes. 
Reminds me of retro Ps1 games but in VR!

developer_response.body:
Stoppp, us Aussies are not used to hearing such nice things from our cheeky Kiwi cousins 🥝🥝🥝 💖💖💖🥹🥹🥹

Thank you so much! Reading these words really motivates us. We seriously appreciate the fact that you deemed our game worthy of one of your rare reviews. The fact that you had such an awesome time with our game is fantastic.

Love your point about the age demographic too. Our goal from the start was not to make something for children, but instead for the inner child. It's awesome to hear that we brought you back to that place with some nostalgia.

Also, if you want to keep up to date with Max Mustard news or come say hi (I'm cozitime on there), we've got a community Discord Server [discord.gg/8rDmh8N] we'd love for you to join!

Again, thank you so much <3
